name: Lazy Lasagna
recipeInstructions:
1. MEAT SAUCE: Brown the hamburger, add 2 cans of spaghetti sauce, tomato paste, 6 oz water, and basil. Simmer for 15 minutes.
2. Cook the lasagna noodles as directed on the package. Drain and toss with 1 tbsp oil.
3. Line the bottom of a baking dish with the cooked noodles.
4. CHEESE MIX: Combine 3 cups cottage cheese, 2 eggs, and 1/3 cup Parmesan cheese in a bowl.
5. Spread half of the meat sauce over the noodles in the baking dish.
6. Cover with a layer of noodles.
7. Spread the cheese mix evenly over the noodles.
8. Add the remaining meat sauce on top of the cheese mix.
9. Cover with shredded mozzarella cheese.
10. Bake at 375°F (190°C) for about 45 minutes, or until heated through and bubbly.
